{{CargoRelic
|name=Cathay Postcard
|class_id=20064
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Cathay, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=14
|art=30
|fth=11
|civ=18
|tech=17
|ss1=Cathay Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Cathay Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Cathay Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Cathay Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Cathay Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
